1.description: get Lillestrøm municipality geometry and bounding box

2.description: get quick-clay polygons intersecting the municipality bbox

3.description: get parcels in Lillestrøm (by kommunenummer) with point geometry

4.description: get 1km grid cells intersecting the municipality bbox

5.description: find parcels that intersect quick-clay polygons (parcels in quick-clay)

7.description: count distinct parcels per grid cell

8.description: sort grid cells by parcel count descending

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(ST_Transform(omrade,25833))) AS xmin, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(ST_Transform(omrade,25833))) AS ymin, ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(ST_Transform(omrade,25833))) AS xmax, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(ST_Transform(omrade,25833))) AS ymax, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Lillestrøm%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT objid, skredomrid, skredomrnavn, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, ST_AsEWKB(omrade) AS omrade_geom_wkb FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(273111.449998925,6629675.919999996,301398.5999995858,6665930.429999998,25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, teig.matrikkelnummertekst, teig.kommunenummer, teig.representasjonspunkt AS geom_wkb FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE teig.kommunenummer = '3205';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, ssbid1000m, geom FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km WHERE ST_Intersects(geom, ST_MakeEnvelope(273111.449998925,6629675.919999996,301398.5999995858,6665930.429999998,25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom_wkb"
-- right_geom: "omrade_geom_wkb"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: spatial_join
-- left_source: 5
-- right_source: 4

-- STEP BOUNDARY --
